meta.defaultDescription: Blik Marketing — full-cycle marketing agency. Strategy, positioning, brand design, social, PR and crisis management for premium brands.

hero.title: The premium light
hero.subtitle: Strategy, brand, communications and creative for companies that aim to be genuinely noticed.

aboutShort.headline: A premium marketing studio — based in Moscow since 2022, working with clients across the world.
aboutShort.lead: We sit at the intersection of strategy, brand and communications. Every project is a point of refraction — the moment a brand becomes seen, wanted and commercial.

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: Six disciplines that together close a full marketing cycle — from insight to crisis communications.

research.name: Research & Strategy
research.short: Market intelligence and the roadmap for launching or scaling.
research.full: We investigate the market, segments, audience behaviour and competitors. Then we shape a strategy you can defend in front of investors and run day-to-day — with metrics, budgets and a sequence of steps.

positioning.name: Positioning
positioning.short: Messaging architecture and guides for every audience segment.
positioning.full: We build the brand platform: mission, values, attributes, archetype, tone of voice. Messages get crafted for every segment and every touchpoint — from landing page to sales team.

design.name: Design & Creative
design.short: Brand platform, creative campaigns and identity systems of any scale.
design.full: From logo and identity to packaging, landings and ad campaigns. We design visuals where premium reads on the intuitive level — before the first word is ever read.

smm.name: Social & ORM
smm.short: Social media and online reputation management.
smm.full: Content strategy, production, community management and influencer work. Alongside, a systematic ORM practice: mention monitoring, review management, SERM optimisation.

pr.name: PR & Media
pr.short: Running the brand's media field: publications, partnerships, ambassadors.
pr.full: We secure federal and industry coverage, PR campaigns for launches and products, work with stars and experts. We measure ourselves by the trust earned, not just the reach reported.

crisis.name: Crisis Management
crisis.short: Systemic marketing and reputation under crisis conditions — and the leap afterwards.
crisis.full: We step in when the fall has to stop and communications must be restarted. Full audit, legal and media assessment, a trust-recovery strategy and an aggressive growth plan for the post-stabilisation phase.

cases.title: Selected projects
cases.subtitle: A handful of projects. The full list lives in the portfolio.

industries.title: Industries we've worked across
industries.subtitle: From premium real estate to pharmaceuticals — we speak the language of every client's market.

points.title: Strategy before tactics
points.body: No banner ships until there is a clear answer to the insight it's built on.

points.title: Full cycle, one team
points.body: Research, brand, production and media — one team, one accountability, one entry point.

points.title: Metrics, not decks
points.body: We optimise cost per follower, reach, awareness and sales — not slide counts.

points.title: Premium craft
points.body: We work with brands where form speaks as loudly as substance.

about.title: Blik is the point where a brand becomes visible
about.lead: A team of 12 specialists in Moscow, building premium brands for the Russian and international market since 2022.
story: The agency was founded in 2022 as an independent practice at the intersection of branding and strategy. The first clients came through reputation — with a specific positioning brief.

Over three years we grew into a full-cycle studio — adding research, creative production, social and PR. Today we work across real estate, fashion and beauty, HoReCa, IT, FMCG, pharma and automotive — in Russia and internationally.
The way we work is engaged. We don't spread across dozens of parallel briefs — we take on work where we can actually move the needle.
about.philosophyLead: The concept of BLIK is about the instant light refracts and becomes an accent.
about.philosophy: Every brand we work with passes through that point of refraction. We don't turn up the volume — we focus it. We find the edge where the product glitters. And we make sure the audience sees that glint.
about.teamSubtitle: 12 specialists. Each one leading their craft.

contact.title: Ready to talk about your project?
contact.subtitle: Tell us about the challenge — we'll come back within one working day with a short take and next steps.
